rank_convergence.note: Rank 0 and rank 1 CONVERGE to same value at large conductor

interpretation: Variance stabilizes at ~0.15 for N > 10^4 (15% below GUE 0.178). Rank-dependent differences vanish at large conductor. The sub-GUE value is likely the correct finite-sample estimate with 35-40 zeros per curve. NOT an anomaly — a measurement limitation.
verdict: The overshoot is REAL but STABLE. The variance does not keep dropping. It converges to a rank-independent value ~15% below GUE, likely due to finite number of stored zeros per curve.
